purpose: Implementation roadmap for converting the deeper short-form repo research into content-machine runtime artifacts.

artifacts.purpose: Record speech, music, silence, diarization, loudness, and language hints before captions or clip scoring.
Store raw and refined word timing, confidence, speaker labels, and alignment warnings.
Group words into readable mobile caption chunks with line breaks and reading-speed checks.
Convert caption groups and recipes into frame-level render cues with platform safe-zone checks.
Bind prompt family, input schema, output schema, validator, and repair policy for a generation stage.
Store source-word-preserving transcript edits, removed ranges, hook, and estimated duration.
Record renderer options, selected runtime, license notes, fallback runtime, and decision reason.
Audit provider, renderer, fallback, budget, visual, and approval decisions across a project.
Track project status, artifact versions, approval gates, and resumable next actions.

gates: Renderer choice is recorded before render.
Caption timing and caption styling are separately inspectable.
Longform transcript edits never invent source words unless explicitly marked as rewritten copy.
Generated or copied assets cannot pass publish review without ledger provenance.
A failed downstream stage can resume from the last valid upstream artifact.
